rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself against prior “meta-analytic generalizations for sales response elasticities,” and the cited paper is exactly a meta-analysis that provides such a benchmark (personal selling elasticity) with moderator and method-bias analyses. Given this close methodological and conceptual overlap, the citation is plausibly a foundational/comparison source rather than an incidental mention. With only DOI-level match evidence but strong note-level alignment, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
